note: 2026-05-12 balanced speed profile after source review: upstream already parallelizes recall per memory inside one _process_memory_batch. Therefore safe throughput should cap recall fanout as batch_size * parallel_batches. Use 25 * 2 ~= 50 concurrent recall/search calls (below DB pool 60) while allowing two scope/batch LLM passes concurrently. This should be faster than pure serial scope passes but avoid the earlier 50 * 6 ~= 300 recall fanout that caused asyncpg search timeouts.
